CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Offer_Strength__c ) = 'Facing many competitors offering similar or better deals',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Offer_Strength__c ) = 'Other offers could better meet customer requirements',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Offer_Strength__c ) = 'Offer is superior to others but still faces competition',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Offer_Strength__c ) = 'Offer is very compellive compared to alternative available to customer',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Offer_Strength
